{
  "judge_id": "your_judge_id",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.2", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 4,
    "R1.2": 3,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 3
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The rewrite clarifies the central contribution (D_k) and strengthens the framing by connecting it to the convergence theorem. It identifies a conceptual issue (the need for a principled uncertainty estimator) and proposes a tighter framing.",
    "R1.2": "The rewrite addresses some logical inconsistencies by explicitly stating the assumptions of the theorem and discussing failure modes. However, it doesn't fully walk through the argument chain end-to-end.",
    "RX.1": "The rewrite mentions potential limitations (failure modes) but doesn't explicitly quantify uncertainty for specific claims.",
    "RX.3": "The rewrite stays within the scope of improving the original text by focusing on clarity and strengthening the central argument.",
    "RX.4": "The rewrite does not introduce any new errors or harmful content.",
    "RX.5": "The rewrite makes some changes traceable, but it doesn't provide detailed annotations for every non-cosmetic change."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.9,
    "R1.2": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 0.7,
    "RX.3": 0.95,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.8
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: The rewrite clarifies the central contribution (D_k) and strengthens the framing by connecting it to the convergence theorem. It identifies a conceptual issue (the need for a principled uncertainty estimator) and proposes a tighter framing.
rationale.R1.2: The rewrite addresses some logical inconsistencies by explicitly stating the assumptions of the theorem and discussing failure modes. However, it doesn't fully walk through the argument chain end-to-end.
rationale.RX.1: The rewrite mentions potential limitations (failure modes) but doesn't explicitly quantify uncertainty for specific claims.
rationale.RX.3: The rewrite stays within the scope of improving the original text by focusing on clarity and strengthening the central argument.
rationale.RX.4: The rewrite does not introduce any new errors or harmful content.
rationale.RX.5: The rewrite makes some changes traceable, but it doesn't provide detailed annotations for every non-cosmetic change.
